name: io.github.miller-joe/shopify-mcp
description: MCP server for Shopify Admin API with a ComfyUI bridge for AI product image generation.

environmentVariables.name: SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Admin API access token (shpat_...). See README for how to create a custom app on a dev store.

environmentVariables.name: COMFYUI_URL
environmentVariables.description: ComfyUI HTTP URL for bridge tools. When unset, generate_* bridge tools are disabled.

environmentVariables.name: COMFYUI_DEFAULT_CKPT
environmentVariables.description: Default ComfyUI checkpoint filename for bridge tools (default: sd_xl_base_1.0.safetensors)
